title: serratula cyanoides
intro: Serratula cyanoides, also known as Blue Carrot or Chinese Buttons, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Serratula cyanoides include reducing fever, treating snake bites, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Serratula cyanoides typically involve drying the plant, then using it to make tea, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
